mapper.select: SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, tactics_id AS tacticsId, level, create_time AS createTime FROM user_tactics_instance WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, tactics_id AS tacticsId, level, create_time AS createTime FROM user_tactics_instance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (instance_id = #{tacticsId} OR tactics_id = #{tacticsId}) ORDER BY CASE WHEN instance_id = #{tacticsId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_tactics_instance (instance_id, user_id, tactics_id, level, create_time) VALUES (REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{userId}, #{tacticsId}, #{level}, #{createTime})
